data.title: Ether surges 47% in a month; hedge fund predicts no downturn soon. Felix Xu of ZX Squared Capital cites strong data.

data.title: AI Agents will transform event prediction with FutureBench's new AI benchmark, testing reasoning beyond past knowledge. #TechNews #AI
data.description: A new AI benchmark created by FutureBench is designed to predict future events, pushing AI reasoning abilities beyond previous knowledge boundaries. The benchmark is aimed at evaluating AI models' predictive capabilities and enhancing their capacity to anticipate future outcomes. This innovation signifies a significant shift towards advancing AI technology for forecasting and decision-making. The benchmark aims to test AI systems with a diverse range of prediction tasks, enabling them to demonstrate their proficiency in anticipating forthcoming events. This development aims to improve AI systems' predictive accuracy and further enhance their cognitive abilities.

data.title: WSPN's WUSD stablecoin is now on Coins.ph with PHP trading pair in the Philippines.
data.description: In Tortola, British Virgin Islands, on July 17, 2025, the Worldwide Stablecoin Payment Network (WSPN) revealed that its USD-backed stablecoin, WUSD, is now available for trading on Coins.ph, the prominent cryptocurrency exchange in the Philippines. This move marks a significant step for WSPN, as WUSD is now accessible to a wide user base in the Philippines through this partnership. Coins.ph, known for its active user community, offers a strong platform for the trading of WUSD, enhancing its liquidity and market presence in the region. This listing opens up new opportunities for users in the Philippines to engage with the stablecoin, promoting financial inclusion and providing access to a stable digital asset within the local crypto ecosystem.
The ASX 200 Index climbed 1% to a record high of 8,726.80 points.
